heightened.text: The damage from your rope Strikes increases by 2d6.

spell.name: Lashing Rope
spell.targets: up to 50 feet of unattended rope or an inanimate rope-like object
spell.text:
You cause a section of rope or a rope-like object to animate, slither to your square, and encircle you, wreathing you in twisting, lashing fibers.  
  
When you Cast the Spell and each time you Sustain the Spell, you can make a melee Strike with the rope, which uses and contributes to your multiple attack penalty. These rope Strikes are melee spell attacks; have the magical, reach, and trip weapon traits; and deal 3d6 slashing damage.  
  
If you critically fail a check to Trip using the rope, you can’t make any more Strikes with it this turn, nor can you use it to make a Reactive Strike until the beginning of your next turn. This replaces the usual results of a critical failure to Trip.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.
